name: Movie RAG Chatbot — Exa Search + Claude Recommendations to Slack
description: Takes a movie preference or question, uses Exa search to find relevant movie data and reviews, uses Claude AI as a recommendation engine to suggest movies with explanations, and posts results to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Building RAG chatbot for movie recommendations with Qdrant and Open AI

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for movie search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post recommendations

query.description: Movie preference or question (e.g. 'A movie about wizards but not Harry Potter' or 'Best sci-fi movies like Blade Runner')

maxRecommendations.description: Number of movie recommendations to generate

steps.name: Search for relevant movie data with Exa
Parse Exa results into movie context
Run Claude AI movie recommendation engine
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit movie recommendations
